title: SQL: EXCEPT is picky and doesn't work
poc: select class from range except select 16;
select class from range except select cast (16 as integer);
select class from range except all select cast (16 as integer);
key_bug_features: EXCEPT clause fails with type casting
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id integer, value varchar(50), created_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
SELECT id FROM test_table EXCEPT SELECT 2;
SELECT id FROM test_table EXCEPT SELECT CAST(NULL AS integer);
SELECT id FROM test_table EXCEPT ALL SELECT CAST(1 AS integer);
